verdict.answer_first: B states the core plan in sentence 1: “turning it into a Progressive Web App (PWA) built around a service worker”; A opens with “No worries” and delays the outcome.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits to one governing split: “read-only or read-write offline?”; A surveys layers, frameworks, caching modes, sync engines, and follow-up paths.
verdict.fabrication: B invents an unverified estimate: “roughly a day of work”; A has vague claims but no concrete fabricated number.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on because it reduces the plan to PWA + service worker + cache + one read/write decision; A has more detail but too many branches.
